title: reconciliation_report
description: Deterministic output of reconcile.py. Every input record lands in exactly one bucket. Any non-matched bucket is a halt-and-flag item for a human; nothing is auto-resolved.

matched.description: timesheet+invoice agree on {client, period}, hours, and amount

amount_mismatch.description: hours agree but billed amount != expected amount (exact compare)

hours_mismatch.description: hours disagree between timesheet and invoice

missing_invoice.description: timesheet with no invoice for its {client, period}

orphan_invoice.description: invoice with no timesheet for its {client, period}

duplicate.description: more than one timesheet or invoice for the same {client, period}; not matched, flagged for a human
